text: this starbucks is convenient and like most of the other establishments delivers a similar experience i find it kind of funny that it s right next door to a dunkin donuts but maybe that s a benefit for those of us who don t want to pay for a scone made from organic power berries harvested from the heart of the jungles of expensivecoffeebeanland

not up to the high standards of service that most starbucks are know for i ordered a triple grande caramel mach and when i got it it felt like only two thirds full i was in a hurry so i didn t complain as i should have as i was leaving i stopped to go to the restroom and a pregnant young woman coming out warned me there was no toilet paper i went into the other restroom and it was also out of paper and dirty very disconcerting

for the most part this location does a decent job in delivering good temperature appropriate food beverages on many occasions they ve forgotten to give napkins condiments and or handed items out of the window one by one rather than putting everything into a bag i know there s a pandemic going on and shortages on supply but let s think logically and give the customers what they need

i go here all the time and there is literally never the same employees very confusing not sure if it s a training store or what sadly my cloud macchiato was completely wrong today even more sad i expected it because my orders have been messed up in the past every employee i ve come in contact with is super nice though

as others has said this is by far one of the slowest locations i ve ever been at one person working taking orders and working as a cashier the majority of my time in the drive thru was listening to her taking orders a definite need for more help or training my frappe was very good but melted a little while i waited to be served

at the drive thru was packed and slow the employee working the drive thru was slow and i had to ask for stir sticks stoppers for the drinks that was odd but not too bad what was bad you ask having to ask for my change i handed her my cash and was expecting almost an entire dollar in change she took my money and said thank you have a nice day my response after starting at her for a few seconds may i have my change confused look from her uhm yeah uhm how much was it again i don t know if you expected the change as a tip or just had a brain fart but seriously give me my change you didn t deserve a tip after making me wait as you screwed up my order took your time on my order and then neglected to give me change i ll skip a return to this location at any time of the day

used to be one of my favorites but a fair number of the staff aren t as friendly as the previous employees i like their product but half of the starbucks attraction is atmosphere and if employees are grumpy it ruins the vibe

disappointed when i got my vanilla bean frap i asked for extra carmel and i didn t get one drop of carmel the person in drive thru really needs to listen to the customers order and they didn t have enough green tea

when i m driving on the this is our stop to make to stretch the legs use el ba o and get a drink it s more about the strategic location than the actual location it s usually dirty on the floor the service is at a minimum and it is average on speed too bad it s not known for the better i hope they raise the bar soon this does not mean that the employees don t care who knows only they do but it does mean that it is sorely lacking when it comes to other more cheerful and clean starbucks
got a vanilla iced latte with oat milk a chai tea late and a caramel br l e latte they gave me an extremely small cup for the latte and it was still about the cups were also sticky

people working at pm on a thursday one of whom is training we went inside to order our two drinks a honey almondmilk flat white and a mocha frappuccino it took at least minutes to get our drinks now they do have a drive through they had some pre orders and of those people were training but the trainee made our drinks and there were only drinks picked up while we were there it s obvious their priority is with the drive through customers and this is something all of the starbucks seem to do at least in my recent experience their specialty drinks are tasty but overall starbucks brewed coffee is horribly over roasted read burned still when i can t locate a local coffeehouse and there is a starbucks nearby when i need a coffee fix i ll go

was super excited to have this location here since i could hit the drive by before work to grab coffee i did go inside and it s very small the entrance is shared with the bank however the first time going the service was super slow and there were only customers in line the one barista messed up my friends drink it was remade and she loved it so she didn t complain but my friend had to remind the women to give her a cookie she ordered my nd time going was very pleasant and i used the drive thru very convenient and look forward to coming back

this starbucks gets my order correct times out of which is great but this is by far the slowest starbucks i have ever been to i ve gone to this one fairly regularly since they opened and my experience is always the same when the drive through is busy you could wait as long as minutes from ordering to actually getting to the window going inside does not make too much of a difference either this is not to say that the staff is slow they are always working and moving as fast as possible the problem is that they do not have enough staff or kitchen space to keep up with the volume of patrons my recommendation put in a mobile order before you leave your house and it might be ready by the time you get there

first of all i love starbucks my husband and i were looking for coffee the day we left reno we figured any starbucks is the same i was disappointed with this location and had to wait over minutes for two coffees the way it was set up it was awkward to say the least it seemed we had to push chairs out of the way to walk out the one and only door we had to enter the workers were friendly enough but it just seem to take forever and was awkward

i love starbucks but i avoid this one it has some of the slowest service i have ever experienced at a starbucks i was there days ago the guy who was doing the drinks loves to talk to the costumers and his co workers which is fine i just noticed he does a lot of talking and no working too he will stop working and just start talking and talking there was only one person ahead of me and it still took almost minutes to get my drink i also got over charged at one point the price on the menu was lower then the price i was charged i added nothing special to my drink i was going to ask for an explanation or my money back but there was a big line at that point so i let it go small coffee shop not much sitting music can be too loud sometimes on the plus side there is a sweet cece s and a chipotle right next door that s a bonus

i m used to quality service came back from europe where baristas are awesome i drive about minutes to get to this starbucks and their service is getting worse every time i come here two days in a row i asked for a brownie and chocolate chip cookie at pm and they are out of it those are two main things a coffee shop should have coffee was good tho so i will be taking my business else where can t go to red lion and blvd or the one inside target which is the worst of them all probably try abington area next time

this is my morning go to coffee spot before the gym absolutely love james he always has great customer service however the past few times i ve been my coffee is half full i always order a grande and it feels so light i didn t take a single sip from this coffee and finally checked it this time i don t want to sound rude at the drive thru asking for it to be a full cup like i know there s space for whip but my goodness
frequently get lukewarm coffee they always remake the coffee when i have time to go in and ask but this is starbucks they should have hot coffee at all times

quick service very clean i ordered a blonde cappuccino and after the foam i had less then half a drink that s was really disappointing flavor was good just wish i could have had a full cup for the price of starbucks drinks

frequent here there is usually a line in the drive thru and subsequent wait today was a it long though i was the only car in line customer service was poor today as well when i did get my non specialized cold beverage the cashier did not look at me and leaned it our the window half tilted this rubbed me the wrong way service is normally better perhaps he was having a bad day inside the store it is clean and cozy the bathrooms are also very clean

this is open for a while now and one thing they need to work on is maintaining the condiments counter i m there often and almost always its out of supplies i m also somewhat disappointed that they don t fill the coffee to the top why should i get cup of coffee happened too many times to not say anything about

i have to update my review based on the experience i had on a double star thursday obviously it was a busy morning which is why i placed my order with the mobile app i arrived minutes after the eta i was provided there were at least baristas running around i stood right in front of the mobile order plastic window protector for about minutes without being acknowledged by anyone then another lady came around me and one barista finally came over to ask her first if she s been helped i highly doubt you didn t see my broad shoulders in my large black hoodie sis i just don t know what it is sometimes this location provides outstanding service and then other times you get barely mediocre service at least my eggnogg latte and roasted ham and swiss sandwhich tasted good i asked for shots of espresso in my eggnogg latte but it didn t taste extra charged like i was hoping
this starbucks has probably one of the rudest barista s ever slamming the oven throwing our food down i get that it s early but if you hate your job change it three stars because the coffee is good

more than half of the people here were waiting for their coffee i put in a mobile order and my breakfast sandwhiches were done by the time i arrived however my brewed coffee and green tea took a total of minutes exactly they re down to one espresso machine today but it seemed like there were plenty of staff one person was being trained maybe have someone pour drip coffee and make tea otherwise place seems nice plenty of seating and not too loud

we will start with the good this particular starbucks is located just off of i and is open hours a day after that though it kind of heads downhill when we stopped in it was late afternoon and nobody else was in there for whatever reason it still took way too long to make a few simple drinks another reason for the low rating there is no place to really hang out here as there is with just about every starbucks no chairs or couches the place is purely built for you to go in and out and that is all overall just not the starbucks experience i am used to getting

i happen to spend a lot of time and money at this starbucks every time i go i am amazed at how slow the drive thru line moves the lady baristas are ok but jay and guy put them to shame with their impressive customer service skills drinks are inconsistent but beggars can t be choosers

i come here all the time most of the time the staff is on point a few times ive had one particular young lady at the drive thru who just doesn t understand coffee money or customer service tonight in particular i ordered a dirty chai with an extra shot and she told me i was ordering a made up drink ummmm no that s a very common drink served at most coffee shops it s literally on their menu when she went to hand me the drink she just shoved her arm in my car and didn t say a word just hoped i saw her it s very weird and she needs training everyone else is great just not her

you take time to write a review if is really good or the opposite i like this location nothing really that can be criticized other then long lines every time but i like the crowd the outside patio is great but i only give stars because every time i go they misunderstand my order now i learned to read what they write on my cup misspelling my name is fun but me repeating a few time coconut milk please is embarrassing if i see they put my drink in dairy blender i know they got wrong and i ask again some are funny and chat with you make a nice comment but yesterday both girls the one that took order and one made my drink forced me write the review this morning she took a long time to make this mocha frap with coconut milk chat with her coworker that was carrying buckets of ice making jokes between the two got distracted with so many other moves around meantime started like few other drinks literally i saw my drink waiting at every step to get to the next it was in blender for like over minutes because she served a few other drinks she even took time to rinse the blender cup and top before she got a top for my drink to serve it my drink got to me very watery because it was melting already and not much flavor i don t think i had all ingredients in it but i had to run otherwise i would have told them to remake it did not risk it for another long wait what can i say i will go there again because the nice location and very convenient to enjoy a sunny morning

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks and this one is a starbucks that doesn t say much but simultaneously says it all i m a purist with my coffee and always just order coffee no frills there should be a separate line for people like me who order they turn and fill a cup and we are gone i don t even need to go to the separate counter to pick up but i digress this was coffee and it was good
this place has the a c on freezer cold bring a sweater everything else seems normal

it s starbucks my default rating for fast food chains is stars and they didn t do anything special to rise above that they didn t do anything bad enough to lose a star either though i was seriously tempted to drop one for the lack of drive thru there is at least a parking lot though

the best thing about this starbucks is seeing the line of cars wrapped around the building as you walk inside to no line the worst part waiting because everyone working is handling all the requests from the drive thru other than that it s an average starbucks with the usual offerings
i have gotten my usual vente americano here they did a fine job makes me want to grab some every time before i shop

this location usually very busy seating is decent the problem is for some reason the customers here all think they live in beverly hills and shouldn t have to wait or suffer the fools behind the counters the employees here have always treated me well

i love this place i spend a lot of time here yes i drink a lot of coffee and tea to add a needs improvement comment i think this location would serve its customers better if they spent more time on cleanliness they really need an employee to address the trash cans which aren t emptied until they re overflowing they really need an employee to walk the floor with a dust mop picking up paper scraps dropped napkins and the like they really need an employee to wipe down each table they really need an employee to address the restrooms refilling tissue seat covers soap and sweeping the floor the manager is very nonchalant and appears to not notice these problems in a place with such a revolving door of customers all day every day cleanliness should be priority one add the recent virus outbreaks in the news and i d say sanitizers should be everywhere if i were managing the above items would be addressed times a day between rushes i still love them though

this starbucks does not rock my world in any way but i have to stop here when i am in tampa because i am always driving by it on my way back to orlando and convenience matters more than quality service is generally fine good but unremarkable the speed of service however costs the location its stars i find that the wait time here is often far too long even when there is not a huge line still where there are no other real options and time is of the essence you will find that you get what you need and sometimes that is enough

this location is poorly operated and the service is always slow yes i understand it takes longer to make some of the specialty drinks but the service here is very slow this morning there was a long line and a woman complaining that her mobile drink was not ready for pick up again forget the sensitivity training and train your employees how to actually provide service at a reasonable pace the star rating is for the decent size parking lot and decent size indoor outdoor seating other than that not much else i can say
slow service ordered one iced coffee with cream and one americano plain took over twenty minutes to make and no apology for the wait i don t care for starbucks coffee but was desperate

i usually drive through starbucks but today i had to use the facilities so i went inside i ordered my usual iced blueberry black tea no liquid cane sugar two pumps sugar free vanilla it was not very busy i used the restroom came back out and waited and waited and waited for my ice tea while waiting another lady asked where her egg bites were she already had drank of her venti tea and still no food it appeared that the young men working were too busy talking to a young girl to fill orders one girl was working and she was doing everything i m not sure they left out the cane syrup as i watched her make my drink by that point i just wanted my drink and to leave not a happy customer today i m hoping sbux sends me a request for a survey as they often do

my past visits here have been awful i usually get iced coffee or cold brew they are usually out of cold brew but the one time they had it they didn t cut it so i got a venti cup of cold brew concentrate maybe that s why they are always out luckily i was on my way home so i was able to cut it in half at home the iced coffee always tastes burned the good thing is the baristas are friendly the food has tasted good i m going to be visiting panera for my coffee fix from now on

let me start by saying i am a starbucks fan i do enjoy the friendly customer service i receive at this location and this is why i continue to return time and time again however id like to understand why it is you have signature drinks such as white chocolate mocha for example and i am certain each staff member is trained on how to make such drinks with the proper measurements of ingredients being added thus making it a signature drink that if you order it it should at least have that familiar taste to it each and every time for the life of me i cant seem to figure out why that isn t the case at least not in my experience to this location i generally get the same drinks each time however depending on the person working it can taste as unfamiliar to me as the person serving the drink all id like to know is why if everyone is making the same drinks nothing extra is being added or removed how come i cant seem to get the same drink each time with the same expectant taste i came here for

bumbling and questioning the customer was my experience with this location i m a regular customer but i usually avoid this store today my order and payment process were messed up and the fix of both were cumbersome i had already left the store when i realized my food order was wrong i came back and was questioned if i had really ordered what i wanted i think the person taking my was very distracted and i believe that was the reason for the issues but she didn t really accept full responsibility

i really like the interior but i don t like how online it says open till but then i get there to work on a paper and they tell me at pm they close in minutes they didn t have their hours posted anywhere in the store i also don t like how they start putting their food away at pm

doesn t open until most days fyi i ve gotten good drinks here and bad drinks here i ve also gotten food warmed up fully and food that s still frozen in the middle seems like a hit or miss location regarding quality

in the land of dunkin donuts it was nice to actually find a starbucks unfortunately the whole our air condition barely works bs is not helping the fact a large pile of sweat beads is starting to drip down the crack of my ass as i sat their on my lap top trying to pretend my life is meaningful

we stopped in this starbucks to kill some time waiting for dinner reservations while the barista who took our order she was brand new was helpful and super sweet what i found horribly off putting was there was an off duty staff member in line in front of us who was incredibly rude to the new barista behind the till to the point she just let herself behind the counter to punch in the order herself also at the kid station the garbage had been pulled out like someone was changing it but never finished for nearly minutes aside from that our drinks and food were prompt and very tasty after the horrible attitude of the off duty barista though i don t know that i ll be in a huge rush to return to this location

i am a regular at this starbucks and found all the staff to be very nice and friendly except i had an awful experience with an employee today she was rude and kept interrupting me when i was trying to order and lied to me about not having any blueberry muffins despite there being on display and didn t even bother to check i even called in to check if they had muffins two minutes after i ordered and they did have blueberry muffins i will not be returning to this starbucks again thanks isabel you just lost a customer

morning crew on saturday needs to up their game baristas didn t get tops solidly on the cups this didn t start the morning off well they had difficulty comprehending simple directions in spite of having to clean up spilled coffee i gave the place three stars because during the week this place usually gives good service

love the location on mass ave but the service here is always spotty they had four people behind the counter so i couldn t figure out why it took over five minutes to give me a brewed coffee it was already made and just needed pumped from the pot to the cup the barista had the personality of a wart on a frog she s wearing a mask but wouldn t speak up so had to keep asking her to repeat she appeared to be asleep with her eyes open working with all of that caffeine i think would present an opportunity to stay awake

these folks have the wrong recipe or don t know how to make the new lime and berry refreshers gross should be a tinge of lime green instead was bile colored and sour rancid in taste yuck stars for not rolling your eyes and happily making another beverage for exchange

the staff is usually quite friendly and they make their drinks well however it is always without fail super dirty every time i come in here the tables have trash and crumbs or spilled drinks on them leaving them sticky today two baristas let drink orders pile up while they were chatting with a friend about his boy troubles pretty unprofessional

i usually go to this starbucks every morning for the most part it s like any other starbucks they have messed up my drinks a couple of times because i usually change it up everyday and sometimes the barista will see me and make me what i ordered the day before i guess that s not really a bad thing that they recognize me as a customer sometimes the staff is slow in the morning and if you get there in the late morning don t expect to get any to yogurt sandwiches or bistro boxes they will all be long gone
the drinks were fine but all of my sandwiches are cold in the middle not room temperature cold

ordered online and got there and only my drink was ready i asked if my other item was coming and the lady had the worst attitude about it when i just asked very nicely if it was coming will be returning but hopefully i have a better experience next time

my current star review of this starbucks location is based on a recent visit at the location and could change based on future visits i really enjoy getting their pike place coffee and the spicy chorizo sandwich or the bacon and gouda sandwich for breakfast but one morning i wanted to switch it up and ordered the steak breakfast wrap and put my order in through the mobile app when my wife and i arrived to pickup our order she had gone inside to get our food and drinks when she got inside there was a note on a bag that said see the cashier my wife was confused and asked the worker at the counter what the note meant and they told my wife to go wait in the cashier line for help after waiting in line the cashier informed her that they were out of the wrap and that they could make something else instead my wife proceed to request a bacon and gouda sandwich and waited five minutes without anyone working on the sandwich she went up to the worker who was making the food and asked when the sandwich would be done the worker then threw down the tongs and said they would get to it right away in a somewhat attitude like voice after waiting a total of minutes for a sandwich when we had put the mobile order in minutes earlier this was a pretty big let down if we decide to come back to this location i will update my review as it reflects on the most recent service which i hope will be better than the last time
made it the way i like not the cleanest place i ve ever scene also the lady next to me spilled her hot drink all over my one leg boo
your coffee is way to strong omg i rather get the latte but u guess it is kinda ok i lake wawa coffee better though

i really like that this starbucks opened in richmond heights to give me an option not to have to fight the parking lot situation at the brentwood location however it s been open for quite a while now and there seem to still be quite a few kinks one time they forgot to make my food and i had to interrupt them talking behind the counter to ask for it since i had been waiting awhile another time one employee was working the window and also training someone at the bar who was taking a long time to make my drink by stopping after each step to wait for more instruction i waited minutes for an iced drink and it wasn t correct this past time i was in the drive thru with a lady in front of me that they couldn t answer her questions so someone else had to get on and answer them then she sent her drink back at the window that they had to remake after all that wait they told me the food i ordered was out and i had to wait again for something else this location is gorgeous inside and convenient so i will keep giving them a chance but i hope their training picks up soon and they get more efficient

i come to starbucks waaaayyyyy more than i should i know this location very well the drive thru is always courteous and prompt but sometimes i like to go in the restroom is always disgusting i know these coffees are costly and i know starbucks can afford a cleaning service to clean their facilities their baristas clearly do not think they get paid enough to keep a clean work environment not only was the restroom disgusting but so was the lobby the floors had massive amounts of trash along with what looked like weeks of yuck built up on the floor i d love to offer my company as some relief please contact stellar cleaning services llc if you need a professional to clean this place up now let me start on the baristas there were some awesome workers about months ago but now they are all young and worried about hanging out and how much fun it would be if they could get another of their friends to work here with them omg please split these people up they do not get the job done well when they are busy talking about the weekend coming instead of listening to the order being placed through drive thru they definitely need a class on how to do your job and do less socializing bottom line starbucks costs too much money to not be taken care of in a top notch manner

as a location this starbucks is difficult to say the least the line for the drive thru is frequently wrapped all the way around the store and maybe two or three cars waiting in line on th street as well this is particularly the case in the morning when their can easily be cars waiting the drive through line also makes it very difficult to park in the lot so you can t app order and pick up easily as well there is overflow parking behind the gas station next to it inside this is an amazingly comfortable coffee shop it is clean wide open and very accessible despite the volume of customers they never seem to run out of what i m looking for customer service has always been great here for me as well starbucks coffee will certainly scratch the itch but it s nothing to write home about it s good but it doesn t blow you away

i don t drink coffee but occasionally visit starbucks for other items i paid more than six bucks for a strawberry acai lemonade refresher at this location and after a few sips through the straw i started getting air it turned out that the glass was about ice see photo what a rip off i had a better experience when i ordered hot chocolate

stars because the service here is dismal at best i ve been to this location more than times because th very close to my apartment but if i have the time i head west blocks to the next closest location no matter what you order or how many people are in front of you you will wait at least minutes for a very simple drink ie black coffee and if it s busy i ve waited up to minutes normally i d walk out but when i m craving iced coffee magic the more hip local establishments fail miserably every time the only saving grace to this location is the upstairs area which is bright with a good view of south st for people wqtching and has a lot of seating and tables to read relax or do work

well i m certainly surprised today usually there is this one barista that is super irritated and has the i don t give a crap attitude and for some reason always doesn t make my beverage right and is usually rude today though today mmph my latt was def good and he seemed less rude almost like he was actually trying to be nice however he still had the unhappy face he usually wears i always hated coming here bc the the guy barista could be really rude at times and it s like i always leave feeling super pissed off but because it s convenient i would come here when i m in the area i hope things continue to get better from here

idk any joy i get from visiting this starbucks diminishes at the annoying light that takes forever wish i could chose a different way out but not so the store is nice and quick an friendly everything i enjoy about the brand its just i don t want to visit because of the hassle to get out of there what this intersection needs is a pretty round about that way everyone keeps moving and doesn t have to wait forever at that damn light maybe i ll go again and try to get out another way ughhh im getting old

prices in reno nevada are higher than they are in the bay area for a cup of starbucks the line for this starbucks was about a minute wait if your working in this city of at the hotels i don t think you would be able to get starbucks on your minute break without coming back late after ordering it took about minutes to receive our breakfast sandwiches and more minutes to receive our drinks there were about other customers in the store with only employees we came early january so it could still be high tourist season but the farrah hotel should have a large enough staff capable or making coffee in a more efficient manner i ordered a caramel macchiato and it was cold tasted like pre coffee and did not taste like what i am used to buying in san jose ca it could be a slow starbucks and not during winter or high travel season do they ever have to make drinks but it s starbucks and starbucks is always jam packed no matter where you go conclusion is try to find a bette estate bucks in reno if you can

this starbucks is a hit or miss sometimes i get the most amazing beverage and sometimes it s way off mark today i asked for an iced caramel macchiato stirred and it tasted like milk with caramel flavor and came unstirred smh i would have asked for them to make me up a new one but i was worried that it would be extremely heavy on the espresso so i just stuck with it plus i was to lazy to ask so my bad i guess but if you pay for designer coffee shouldn t it be perfect

service is fine but the quality of their drinks are mediocre at best i would not recommend getting their iced coffee i ve tasted better iced coffee when i made it myself at a hotel their iced lattes are ok but not worth the price only satisfying drink i ve had there has been the pink drink but way too much ice even when i asked for light ice i never bought food from there because i always saw flies buzzing around the food in the display case unsanitary much and my final thought applies to starbucks overall their drinks should be cheaper or at least make the size difference between a tall and a grande greater

so this is the starbucks in tampa s f terminal which happens to be a starbucks reserve they have the reserve clover brewed coffee ultimately it was a little disappointing because i mistakenly thought all reserve locations also had the nitro cold brew i didn t snap a picture but it seems like they ve also significantly downsized from their renovation a year ago there wasn t any starbucks specific seating and i felt squished waiting in line for my drink other than that it was on par with any other location

wow the drive thru was crazy long and there s very little parking i parked and walked in can can t believe those people wait in the drive thru that long i think it was a bank a long time ago shared with jimmy john s

should have stopped anywhere before here stopped for a smoothie thought i d get one with protein and skip a full lunch ordered the strawberry banana and a banana nut bread twenty mins later after i watch him pick up and put down my cup and make coffees for people that came in several minutes after i came barista hands me some coffee drink that s a smoothie oh i read it wrong then he goes to make to come back and tell me they don t have the right protein and asked if i want the new protein sure as long as there is no dairy he proceeds to dump in scoops then before mixing it turns to tell me that oh it does have milk in it uhm yeah that s a problem so now he s on his third remake of my drink so no joke and less exaggeration it took nearly min for one drink in w store with two people in front of me and one behind me who walked out before me i could have gotten a full meal at panera way faster next time

this is the closest starbucks to my house not bad most of the time standard they drive me crazy cause i request light ice on cold drinks as they fill the cup and you end up with about a third of a cup of fluid if i don t get light ice the dollar drink is gone by the time i get home ordered light ice today and they filled the cup i think i ll just skip this starbucks and stop at one where i m not paying for ice instead of a beverage
so i was pushed to pay for my coffee by the cashier before i was able to order food and then the line was people long while i loved my coffee it seems like she could have switched registers

if i were rating this solely based on the amazing individuals that work at this location then believe me you d see the biggest stars possible these employees get hounded daily by huge lines of obnoxious students i ve seen them be berated i ve seen them when they re flustered and i ve seen the way a lot of jerks treat them i absolutely love every employee here and hope that everyone else appreciates them since this location is at the ua and on campus right by the library it gets slammed throughout the day there are times where there are lines that go people out the door and the employees here continue to bust butt to get drink orders out unfortunately the ua has set them up for failure by also having an advanced ordering app not the regular starbucks app they don t do that at this location where while there are people in line there are then college students in classes also ordering drinks so at certain times of the day the in person customers are getting angry because tap and go customers are getting drinks before the in person orders but imagine how hard it is for these few employees to keep up with the people in line and the mobile orders happening at the same time really ua has set them up for failure because people get cranky and take it out on these poor baristas who are doing amazing work unfortunately i have to deduct a star for the long long wait times and for the fact that i think its a horrible business practice to have all of these different ordering systems slamming people but again still stars for the employees they don t let you redeem your stars for a free beverage here that s frustrating you can however still get happy hour deals and other perks here i mainly earn my stars here and then cash them out at regular locations what i really hate about this location is how they nickle and dime you i switch out the milk for soy or coconut in all of my beverages the upcharge for this is fine as i appreciate them offering soy and i realize that costs them a bit more to make i have zero issues with this but what irks me is i used to order drinks with no ice and i d have no issues the ice makes things too cold for me to drink but sometimes i want something that isn t hot either no ice is a great way to get something closer to room temp again i ve ordered like this several times with no issues and i ve never had an issue at any other location ever but suddenly i m told there is a cent upcharge here for no ice they re actually trying to charge you to take ice out of your drink i ve just saved you some water some ice the power it took to make the ice etc and the coffee i m purchasing is around and i usually purchase here x a week x a day that s drinks a week a loyal customer and you really really want to charge someone to take ice out of a drink this new rule comes and goes sometimes they have it other times they don t but basically they need to get over all of their extra charges that don t exist anywhere else seriously this doesn t exist at any other regular or franchise location i ve ever been to at some point you need to realize you re making plenty of money and you don t need to charge to remove ice after all i don t get a discount if i take whipped cream off of my drink employees stars long waits and weird mysterious extra charges stars greed of this location no stars

this been a regular stop on the way to work for me going on years now up front the three stars are for the staff however a couple drag the rest down one with a regularly flippant attitude another common occurrence is at the point of sale when hot food items are ordered the patron s name is not asked and when the order comes a weak callout is made with only the name of the food and consequently not heard in restaurant over the often loud music and sometimes the sound level of the staff having a good time at work i love seeing happy employees so perhaps this is a fair trade off however a half warm breakfast sandwich tastes like hell often they do not have in stock breakfast items like the heated sandwiches who does the ordering and for that matter is there a manager even present seeing to these and the following glaring indiscretions as for the condition of the restaurant i d have to say it s a bit dirty and unattended the window exteriors appear to not have been cleaned since the remodel the window interiors are not far behind the tables don t get wiped on a regular basis through the morning as well as the floor swept and debris remaining throughout the morning it doesn t appear that it s mopped nightly either the supply station is often out of items as i have observed often on my numerous visits at am the condition of the floors as described herein unswept and still showing the signs of the previous business day i did ask about this once and was told oh we got hammered this morning again am and i look around seeing that i was one of three people in the place and but two cars in line outside the staff kids partying it up really as said there is good people working there that take a personal pride in the job they do but all that goes out the door given the aforementioned issues a manager that isn t busy behind the counter preparing orders to oversee that the place is taken care of would be a start a good hard cleaning of the entire restaurant inside and out including the filthy paved areas outside including the furniture is more than overdue i suggest steam cleaning and sterilization can anyone say reset

okay location compared to newtown and other locations baristas are rude and that is my only complaint about this starbucks drinks are good if you don t care about service you shouldn t have a problem going here
love starbucks love their coffee but crystal was extremely rude at the cash register today i hope i never come here again if she s working definitely needs to be trained on customer service

not bad service just weird it s a pleasant place to relax and get some work done the staff is just very self involved i don t want to hear about your weekend construction and trips to the library just a coffee

starbucks is supposed to be starbucks i m not sure why they can t seem to follow the recipe that they were trained to follow i don t order anything extra or special and about of the time it seems that they ve added too many pumps to the drink i should just stick with my neighborhood starbucks

if this were your first experience of the starbucks franchise you would walk away neither overly impressed nor depressed for those of us who ve easily been in dozens of them the feeling is about the same in our particular case this week it was a necessary evil we were trying to locate yet another tourist attraction this sounds like complaining but trust me we were having a fabulous time and the iphone and its handy gps were nearly dead so we ducked into starbucks for a drink and a good long battery charge i d never had a starbucks smoothie before and i ll never have one again it was just not like a real smoothie no fruit chunks no bold fruit flavors nothin interesting and a strong preservative taste to seal the deal but chances are i d have said the same thing if i d gone to any other starbucks nationwide so don t take that the wrong way the girls behind the counter were loud and goofy but at least they were having fun at work plenty of parking out front

they have never messed up an order but they need to update their hours they are not open until pm on sundays i pulled up to the drive thru at pm and they told me that they were closed for the night i was kind of sad after i drove all the way out to edwardsville just for starbucks

i m a frequent visitor to many of the locations around my area i usually order the same thing skinny vanilla latte and a breakfast sandwich i went through the the drive up and was greeted by a very friendly barista while i waited she chatted me up and was peppy for the am hour i was pretty tired and her contagious attitude helped pep me up when i got my drink i gave it a sip and tasted awful like burnt coffee i went in and out when i explained it didn t taste right the manager took it right away apologizing and had the other barista make a new one his demeanor was very different and was disgruntled having to make a new one when i got the new one it tasted the exact same i was sorely disappointed that drink went to waste they could have had stars but when you can t make a standard staple drink on your menu that s a problem

definitely not the best location i was thinking with it being so new maybe that s what kept everyone continuously slow and rude i decided to just start going inside due to that being much quicker than the drive thru there are two blonde guys who work there that are amazing and have a great personality but every woman that i ve come across there is just mean hopefully it picks up and their attitudes improve but for now i m sticking to my coffee and tea at home

this starbucks is still just a solid stars they get the job done but without any extra pizzaz in customer service i stopped in to pick up a grande cold brew before my class over at the apple store the cashier was very dry to be honest i do not remember her even thanking me or ordering the wait for my beverage was minimal considering two others were ahead of me in line the young lady who presented me my drink did thank me for coming in so i figured it was her job to say thanks i wish starbucks would go to paper straws or the new lids that are like a travel mug and do away with the plastic straws will i return only if i am taking a class at the apple store when february why liquid refreshment for class

i come here every morning to order my breakfast depending on who is staffed the drinks can be hit or miss i think the caffeinated drinks are way too strong and needs to be mixed with decade coffee i had to order skinny drinks because the the originals had too much sugar caffeine and some of the food has too much sodium

pros the staff here are super friendly and maintain their composure during very busy times cons it often takes minutes to get a regular or iced coffee if you order at the counter also some of the staff seem to have a knowledge gap when it comes to drinks and such one guy was unsure how many espresso shots were in a drink and another person didn t know which sugar free syrups you had and just said i think it s only vanilla he didn t bother to ask or check however the most frustrating thing is the qa with some of the products the last few times i have been in there the iced coffee was practically see through it was so light it seems like they added too much water to it i ve been drinking black iced coffee at starbucks for about years at locations all over the country so i m not just being a karen i ve actually had to ask them to replace it with cold brew which usually looks better i want to give them stars because most of the people are nice overall but some of the service aspects are lacking hope they fix these things

not my favorite location lines are always too long in the mornings and they take forever to take your order then to fill it barista s constant talking to each other about non starbucks related orders are annoying and could be partly responsible for their lack of attention to details the drive thru starbucks up the street is even worse so i guess this is the best city line has to offer

a starbucks like any other starbucks this is the one i visit when i work in the mall and there isn t anything special about it but there s nothing i have found particularly awful either i mostly visit here as oppossed to tim hortons or seond cup because of the my starbucks rewards program the lineups can get pretty ridiculous obviously since it s in a mall they also tend to have only one person on till even when it does get crazy which is a bit annoying especially if you re going there on your break and don t exactly have minutes to spend standing in line to order and again waiting for that order but most of the servers i ve had have been very friendly and good at their jobs there are one or two there that i dread getting but that s the same anywhere my coffee usually tastes just as i expect it to and only once or twice have they gotten anything on my order wrong and they are always happy to fix it a good option if you re in the mall and want a drink or snack though don t hold out hope of them having the new ish bistro boxes in stock they re sold out more often than not

this starbucks has all the good starbucks taste you would expect but the workers are often chatting about who they are going to get fired next making them take longer on your order if you find it funny this might be a good thing otherwise there are better starbucks out there

so i m doing the keto thang and what other way to try to stick to a meal plan than buy trying different sugar free drinks i ve tried it several locations and this location was one of the worst at making it look like diet crap they did not mix the heavy cream and it made it look like spoiled milk was added to my drink i asked the barista and she brushed me off by saying that s what you ordered but did you have to make it look so nasty next visit they got it right
the espresso shots weren t as strong as they usually are in other starbucks locations i found this disappointing since i really needed the shots to wake myself up for a long drive

if i m paying for a specialty drink i expect them to fill it to the top i go to this starbucks all the time and sometimes they are great and other times they struggle i normally complain but i didn t have time today it s ridiculous give the customer what they are paying for

the drive thru here can be sssssoooooo slow but is awesome and as andrew s said if you wait to long you might get a free java outta the deal but that has only happened once to my dozens of times of waiting minutes for a cup of joe

i stopped by this starbucks a couple days ago to get my free drink from my rewards upon entering i was greeted with a friendly hello and i was glad to see no line the food selection was the same as any other starbucks and i got my drink after a slightly longer wait that usual i ordered a venti caramel frap with two shots of expresso and extra caramel drizzle the taste was fine but as i was walking to my car the drink ended up turning into a latte there wasn t a lot of ice and i m sure it didn t melt in the cold reno weather overall this place is a solid choice if you want a starbucks drink

i m conflicted on this review it is obvious by my check in s here that i am a fan of starbucks however the customer service at this location seems to be lacking there was a time when they were a lot better but in the last few months it has been declining let me start by the presentation of my drink my paper coffee cup shouldn t look like it was dipped in the coffee there shouldn t be coffee around the rim of the lid either second they have a hard time getting my order right lately i order the same damn thing every time a tall with splenda and light ice and a grande with splenda my issue is they always forget the light ice light ice doesn t mean one ice cube in my drink i order light ice because i want to immediately drink my coffee and not have to worry about rd degree burns if my coffee has light ice it shouldn t burn my mouth and make me use profanity other than that it s a starbucks

it s nearly always too busy which i suppose is just a thing to deal with when not too busy it s a lovely place to sit and enjoy a tasty beverage with a friend or with a book they have a deck so in the summer they double their seating capacity so long as the mosquitoes aren t biting i ve been there several times and have received adequate service yesterday i wanted their egg whites feta and spinach sandwich it was unavailable and so the person apologized and then removed the sample from their display this tells me they care about their customers the fellow making the drinks needed help though there were people waiting for drinks by the time i joined the line

i really liked coming to this location however lately going inside customer service has gone downhill load music unfriendly staff no connection with people drive thru is better and one of the fastest hit miss on the drinks sometimes you get more foam than drink the last one i got was not even full so i paid for a grande and got a tall in large cup no good at all hopefully things will change

so me and my son were at this morning and as we were picking up his order this young lady was slightly rude and threw his straw on the counter and we left so i will be contacting the store manager to let them know what happened

i ordered the green tea latte but with a cappuccino ratio of milk unfortunately the cashier wrote latte half foam so i got a very heavy drink i explained the miscommunication to the barista she knew exactly what i wanted and remade it perfectly stars for the young lady

my absolute biggest issue with this store is their mobile ordering what s the point of putting in my order if i still have to wait min for you to acknowledge that i m standing at the pickup area waiting for my coffee that s cold by the time i get it put the orders in the same place as the rest and not behind the counter

i have been going to this starbucks for years seven i have no complaints regarding my drinks i order a variety of concoctions so it s never the same thing for me they do a good job and even when i have to tell them how to make it they typically do a great job so drink wise they get stars but the slightly more mature gentleman that they have working the window has absolutely horrible customer service skills whenever i great him he never says hello back he just gives me a total for my drink he has never said you re welcome even after being told thank you which i do every time today i asked for my receipt and he said the receipt machine isn t working very curtly while never looking at me i can absolutely understand having an off day we all have them it s not great to have them when you work in the customer service industry especially when you re dealing with hundreds of customers a day but it can happen unfortunately he has made me go out of my way to a different location because of his rudeness i don t know if that s his natural personality and demeanor and he s like that with everyone or if he chooses to be like that only with people that are not of his skin color but whatever the reasoning is his customer service skills need to be addressed i have never had this issue in avon or at the one on th st and lafayette rd it s only him at the th st location i m even considering calling and making a verbal complaint because no one should have to be subjected to that

the location and atmosphere are fine it s a mall location i just feel bad for the girl rosie she is miserable at her job and tries to make the feeling mutual u pick ur job love u don t have to hate life n people don t want that vibe notrosie

i live around the corner so i go to this location frequently i don t judge them on their packed drive through or parking lot it s the way most things are in seminole heights my problem with this location is that every time that i visit it after around am they are out of everything milk food cold brew flavor syrups literally everything it s really frustrating to wait in that long drive through line only to find out that they are out of milk

i stopped in at what was the original delaware county starbucks it has been updated a few times since it first opened they stuck with only tables on the last two renovations i hadn t been here in a while but stopped in while waiting for a friend to finish their appointment a few doors down it was a friday evening and i was a bit disappointed there were several people working the counter and i got good service and good coffee why then was i unhappy you are thinking as i am waiting cruising the internet i am in the company of or so pubescent tweeners who are talking drugs and private parts to the extent that in any other location this would be sexual harassment thank goodness it only lasted minutes but i was surprised that the staff just ignored it and let it go on after they left i was inundated by two more sets of teenagers not a place for adult drinkers like the havertown location

i really enjoy starbucks i enjoy stopping off at them from time to time to relax and clear my mind although trying to find a parking space at this location is almost impossible sometimes with that is added stress which i don t need what s sad is the location is very convenient for me i ll be craving a cup of jo as i pass look at the lot and decide to keep going

super slow but super friendly there were only two cars in front of me and they didn t have a massive order or anything but it still took mins to get my drink that s a bit excessive for a drive thru sure i could have mobile order which i usually do but this location said they were out of what i wanted on mobile app but really they were not out my frap was melted and my tea looked like it was sitting around for awhile i m sure they made the drinks right away when i ordered they just took a long time through the drive thru anyways i m sure i ll be back to this location if i m in the area

shtarbucks guys i was waiting for my order for some time and had to hurry up with eating because of the flight boarding on my nose i dropped some food on my pants because of that i understand some inconveniences might happen in any kind of job but there were not that many people and still i had to wait more than it usually takes please take it into the consideration

terrible cold brew i ordered a trente because i needed the boost to get stuff done this morning i watched them fill the cup of the way and they handed it back to me severely watered down with melted ice less than seconds later which leads me to believe they filled the rest with water super upsetting considering i spent on a coffee
as others have said this starbucks isn t great slow service very unfriendly staff but my drink was good so for a airport stop i guess it ll do
saturday morning is crazy everything was good but minutes to get your drink sheesh should have had instead of on cash register and instead of making the drinks

very small and cramped workers were slow and unfriendly no scanner to pay with your phone she attempted to type in the correct info like times so i could pay wasn t too impressed my drink tastes good though hence the stars i did see a really cool starbucks just up the street though and it is in an awesome and authentic looking building so skip this one and go there

the line can be really long in the drive through going inside seems to be punishment for not waiting in the drive through i tried that once and they filled drive through orders for every body inside it seemed drinks are always yummy though
slowest starbucks ever three years i ve been coming here and they never disappoint guaranteed time to get a latte minutes i will say the people who work there are nice but come on
slowest starbucks i ve ever been to don t use the drive through you ll be stuck for an hour

well location isnt an issue there everywhere i dont drink coffee so my review is on everything but why is the venti still kinda small i order tead and a few sips and shes empty the prices seem kind of steep but hell everywheres steep staff is always happy to serve you and there baked goods are rather delicious as well i hate line ups and well theres always on here always seriously i dont think i ve ever walked into a starbucks and never had to wait in line meh its a ok

stopped here while shopping at canal place while in town it s a very small location tucked away in the corner on the ground floor the line builds up rather quickly and on the day i went service was slower than molasses there was one person taking orders and one barista on duty i understand that locations can get slammed with orders but it was almost as if it was the barista s first day he just moved very slowly i couldn t order a java chip frappachino because they were out of java chips so they may want to evaluate their ordering of supplies i m interested how service is when business is slow hopefully not the same and if so i would give him a break

i visit and spend a lot starbucks stores and hold them to a higher standard than a other coffee places as they charge a premium price for coffee and food it s hit and miss like others have said and this is just a slower store which is why it is always claustrophobic in there many of the baristas are very nice but this location is not very intuitive and the older manager lady here is sour sorry i m not the only one who has commented on this it would be helpful to put the mobile orders where customers can get to them i
parking and driver thru here sucks especially on a rainy day if you re looking for a place to plug in and web surf probably not the place

this location is always hit or miss sometimes my order is great and sometimes my order is wrong i counted once and figured out they had messed up my order more than times out of maybe and when i say messed up my order i mean either forgetting something completing giving me the wrong item messing up a drink order or something else it became an ongoing joke anytime i went there the staff was usually helpful when i reported the mistakes but it just shouldn t happen that often to begin with

i m a starbucks fan i just am this one of all of them near the franklin area is the worst they always have not enough people working and the service is so slow unfortunately this one is most convenient and the drive thru who doesn t love the drive thru only a couple times that i ve been here have the staff been friendly or helpful usually i have to check for a pulse of all the locations nearby this one the iced coffee espresso shots taste the most burnt which is annoying it s also loud i came once to get some work done and the speakers were so loud i had to leave maybe that s the goal plus the internet is real choppy here not my fave

whether it s am or pm customer service should be top notch i called in advance for travelers and was told it might be ready when you need it if we don t get a lot of customers this morning i did pay for the travelers when i arrived so i would expect to be treated as a customer as well

this location is always very friendly and accommodating however the last couple of times i ve been and gotten a pink drink it s looked like this sort of hard to see in the photo but it s not mixed well such that the coconut milk is sort of floating in pieces inside the lemonade stuff the first time i thought they were just in a hurry or something but today it was not mixed well again highly recommend the drink but it tastes much better when it s mixed smooth

i stayed at the hotel across from this starbucks and walked to this starbucks i am from the west coast and was looking forward to going to starbucks and talking to the barista about things to do around town well that didn t happen one this is a very busy starbucks even at am two not one employee smiled or looks at you and three when you finally get to the register you don t get a greeting just a what can i get for you now let me say no one is rude but for a southern town i was very disappointed how unfriendly this starbucks was i will stick to the hotel coffee for the rest of my trip

this starbucks is just okay there isn t really anything special about it sometimes they mess up my orders here when i do the online mobile ordering they have added the wrong milk to my coffee and also gave me the wrong food once everytime i order in store my order doesn t come out wrong only when i order on the app there is always a huge line here hence why i do the online ordering sometimes the staff here is in a good mood but other times they aren t you can tell by the way they are talking to the customers if they are or not overall i will continue to come to this starbucks because its convent for me but i hope that their customer service improves and they stop messing up my order
st louis mo airport good coffee as usual workers need to drink coffee to wake the heck up customer service sucks my warmed bread is cold bad attitude from the servers

not the worst but they definitely need to work on some things this starbucks is already located in a target store so i feel like it should lose points for that i don t like having to wade through a sea of middle aged oblivious moms in yoga pants who would rather chit chat than let you get your coffee this actually happened i m not stereotyping there was one woman working when i was here and she was being run ragged she was hustling getting coffee food and everything else that the mams were demanding of her i seriously think she was thrilled when i just ordered a large iced coffee at other stores such a simple order comes out right away but because there was only one person working it took a while seriously target get that girl some help the coffee was mediocre as expected and i only stopped here in the first place because someone gave me a gift card for christmas because they obviously hate me or something anyway if you need coffee during your target trip then this is the spot otherwise you should probably avoid

everyone at this starbucks is nice and that is a plus however they are also incredibly slow it takes them way to long to get my very simple order i used to work for a starbucks so i can appreciate how busy they can be i suspect they put all their attention to their drive thru and neglect the cafe i prefer to go to the dunkin donuts next door they are way faster and it is a much better experience

super disappointed that i just had to sit here and wait minutes for my one drink there was a lot of people in the drive thru and apparently they got priority there was only one person ahead of me inside the store and they didn t even apologize or offer me anything for having to wait for so long for one drink

this starbucks is fine i would agree with other reviewers that there isn t a real sense of urgency with the baristas however i ve only been a few times in the late afternoon when i m not in a rush and there isn t a real line not a good place to work lots of teens hang out around gay street and they want their starbucks fix too might be different during working hours i think the non paying customer issue some reviewers were talking about a few years ago doesn t happen as often anymore kind of a shame that a starbucks is in a nice location on gay street vs a local business fenn s coffee is a short walk away and has a homier local vibe without kids and i ve seen people working there

this drive thru is literally my nightmare can t help the horrific parking situation due to location however it is by far the slowest drive thru i ve ever been to i live around the corner so i go this starbucks on my way to work and i have to plan to leave extra early just in case the drive thru takes an extra minutes which happens almost every time i just don t understand it three stars because my order is always correct and the staff is pleasant
the atomosphere is nice and the music is good for studying it can get loud sometimes when a large group of people come in to study however the internet is terribly terribly slow

this is one of the easier locations to get to except during morning hours go after am the drinks still do not come out consistent i came here for days straight and ordered the same green tea frap all tasted different

i am a huge fan of starbucks and i usual come everyday i ve been stopping at this particular starbucks since mid october because my morning commute changed unfortunately i ve been disappointed with this starbucks on many occasions mainly due to inconsistency in the quality and taste of my drinks i always order a latte or a cappuccino lately i ve been drinking more cappuccinos because the lattes i ve been getting here taste so weak being that a cappuccino has less milk i ve been going with that i don t think i should have to order an extra shot just to get a latte that doesn t taste like pure milk the younger girls who work here make better drinks and deliver good customer service there is an older lady who works here who lacks in both categories i feel bad pointing this out but i shouldn t have to feel like a burden when i come here maybe service would be better if we could tip i m not a difficult customer in fact i have great working relationships with all of the baristas in my hometown store in wyomissing i ve never had a single complaint there honestly i don t even care as much about the service as long as i m getting excellent drinks maybe they re neglecting to tend to the espresso machine properly

i would have given them a four but the gal that made our coffee wasn t the friendliest which was a bummer because we came a couple days later and the guy working the drive thru was very happy and polite i guess some people just have there off days i get it

if you re looking for a place to chill and sip on a frappe this is not the place this starbucks is cramped with very little seating like i counted tiny tables i came in one week and there was this long single line going out the door it looked like everyone was getting off a school bus that s how tight it is inside youre better off going to the starbucks inside safeway maybe the service here is alright it wasn t messy when i came but i wouldn t call this starbucks ghetto
the service is ok coffee and teas are standard if service was better it would get a higher rating they couldn t keep up with people working and people in line

i have a couple complaints about this starbucks my boyfriend and i live nearby so this is the starbucks we frequent especially when we need a pick me up on our way to phoenix we usually get a coffee and a breakfast sandwich my favorite is the spinach feta wrap which is always perfection but twice now my boyfriend has gotten the sausage egg sandwich and it s been cold in the middle another time we frequented this place was to get an iced tea and a latte i ordered an unsweetened passion fruit and the bf got a vanilla latte his came out at least minutes before mine and when i finally got mine and took a sip i could tell it had sweetener in it i checked the cup label to see if it said unsweetened and it did i stood there for another couple minutes before an employee approached me and made me a new drink this all wouldn t have bothered me so much if i didn t have to wait so long in between erik s drink and mine

sunday at noon and they were not organized or efficient the drive thru was packed so i thought going inside would be faster nope i think they take care of drive thru customers before in store customers after waiting a good bit for my grand mocha i had to ask for and wait longer for a warmed morning bun huh food and coffee are consistently good but their service needs help with efficiency
rating starbucks is like rating mcdonald s what s the point yep it s a starbucks on market street attached to the huge marriott hotel about what you d expect from a starbucks no better no worse

drink quality is uniform to any other starbucks i ve been to the people working however had zero communication be it with me or the other workers i think the only words exchanged were my order and my total they also were slow and disorganized there was some asian kid behind the counter with a coat and backpack on making drinks he was talking to some friends on the other side of the counter but where everyone else was wearing the black shirt apron and hat it looked like he works there he did know what he was doing and he stopped by on an off day with his friends to make drinks for them and a few customers really weird parking lot looks cramped but to be perfectly honest it isn t nearly as ridiculous as the starbucks in southington ct so i can t even hold that against them in comparison when i m at our friends in the area i ll stop by if i need my starbucks fix but if i was a local i d probably try to find another

baristas work hard as this location is always slammed with customers i used to be able to put a mobile order in and count on it being ready when i got there i don t know what happened in the last few weeks but every time i have put a mobile order in i ve had to wait up to minutes in the lobby for my order so i m taking a break from starbucks for awhile it s really disappointing
i m still upset about the stupid trash can issue of my previous post but otherwise it s a decent starbucks locations

a little nasty and testy when you ask for refill the workers automatically take for granted that you walked off the premises when you ve been sitting here for minutes working on your computer this is not good business practices by the employees of starbucks

the nashville airport has two starbucks locations the other one can be a disaster line of people i m almost always flying southwest the other terminal but sometimes i ll come to this starbucks because i think it often has shorter lines that s all it s a starbucks and maybe the lines are shorter than that other one

i usually love coming in to this starbucks it is one of three near my home but today a gentleman clearly cut the line and i was next to be served and the barista stilled served him this was not cool especially today because i was running late i told the barista and she didn t even apologize
friendly workers of course expensive i can t understand why they don t put up a fence by the drive through the view is all of their garbage very unsightly

this starbucks is usually top notch i m not sure if it was just a bad day or if they don t have the hang of drivethru service yet we had to give our order three times to three separate people and the order was still wrong my chai was so sweet i couldn t drink it it was only filled up part of the way and it lacked the three shots of espresso that i asked for three times if i go back here anytime soon i am not using the drivethru because it was chaos
